title: Andy Burnham wins crucial Makerfield by-election, intensifying pressure on PM Keir Starmer
summary_full: Andy Burnham's decisive Makerfield by-election victory has intensified pressure on Labour leader Sir Keir Starmer. Winning nearly 55% of the vote, Burnham's return to Westminster signals a potential challenge to Starmer's leadership and Labour's future direction. The result is seen as a significant moment, fueling debate about the party's strategy and its ability to reconnect with voters.
